locations.name: Reader College, dawn garden
locations.description: A walled garden in the College compound, formerly the cloister of a Carthusian monastery. Used for the retirement gowning of jurists. Wet brick paths, an old fountain, ash on the flagstones from the brazier.

sensory_anchors.sight: oxblood robe taking the fire; sun sitting on the College wall
sensory_anchors.sound: gulls beyond the wall; the small wet sound of candle wax
sensory_anchors.smell: wool smoke; rain-on-stone; thin green tea from the refectory
sensory_anchors.touch: wet grass through thin sandals; cold flagstones at the brazier
sensory_anchors.taste: the green tea, allowed to grow cold

locations.name: Reader College, refectory
locations.description: Long oak table, a row of small white bowls, the morning routine. Mei sits across from Lin Wei.

sensory_anchors.sight: Mei's pushed-back hair; the small tin of dried plums
sensory_anchors.sound: spoons against bowls; the radiator behind
sensory_anchors.smell: sweet rice porridge; the iron of green tea
sensory_anchors.touch: the lacquered table edge; the warm bowl
sensory_anchors.taste: porridge that tastes of nothing on a vigil morning

locations.name: Lin Wei's apartment in the College
locations.description: A spare room above the College garden: oak desk, small grey mirror, a porcelain sink in the corner, a radiator that ticks. The garden window faces east.

sensory_anchors.sight: the grey mirror; the desk lamp; the envelope square with the corner
sensory_anchors.sound: the radiator's tick; the distant tram bell (decommissioned line)
sensory_anchors.smell: linen towels; the lamp's warm tungsten
sensory_anchors.touch: the desk's grain; the bone-china teacup; the file's oxblood ribbon
sensory_anchors.taste: third tea of the night, gone cold

locations.name: Court of Mneme, intake chamber
locations.description: Small windowless square. Lit from above. Two oak chairs across a narrow table. Pale grey acoustic felt on the walls. The recording bead in the center of the table.

sensory_anchors.sight: the soft white panel overhead; Han Bo's spread fingers
sensory_anchors.sound: the silence the felt makes against the door; the single click of the bead
sensory_anchors.smell: the cool absence of smell, kept that way on purpose
sensory_anchors.touch: the unbleached linen of new gloves drawn over the knuckles

locations.name: Court of Mneme, depositions chamber
locations.description: Long oval, paneled in pale oak. Two facing benches; the witness chair at one curved end under a single low light. No public gallery.

sensory_anchors.sight: brown-gold field of the wood paneling at the periphery
sensory_anchors.sound: the low ringing of a struck wineglass, persistent
sensory_anchors.smell: old oak; the iron under the cold tea on the deposition tray
sensory_anchors.touch: the pad of the pen against the page
sensory_anchors.taste: cold green tea at the back of the mouth

locations.name: College chapel (vigil)
locations.description: Norman vaulting, narrow windows, black slate floor worn shallow in two long lines. The grey-faced clock at the back stops ticking at vigil and starts again to end it.

sensory_anchors.sight: candle wax shifting in the iron holder; Tao's hood up across the aisle
sensory_anchors.sound: the chapel clock stopping; the wax's small wet sound; her own pulse in her ears
sensory_anchors.smell: old stone; melted wax; the trace smell of incense never used in this century
sensory_anchors.touch: the worn slate underfoot; the wood of the second-row bench

locations.name: Court of Mneme, central hall (with the speculum)
locations.description: A perfectly circular oak-paneled hall. The pale stone floor spirals down six gentle steps into the speculum: a basin of still dim water colored by the day's extract. A dark drape hangs above.

sensory_anchors.sight: the dim water; the drape shifting in the small air
sensory_anchors.sound: forty Readers breathing in the ring; the thin door at the south
sensory_anchors.smell: wax, old oak, the trace of the extract in the water
sensory_anchors.touch: the cold of the speculum step under bare feet
sensory_anchors.taste: the cup of clear water Reader Ji drinks before rendering

locations.name: The Eastern Quarter — old tram line + Pao Street
locations.description: Working-class district across the canal. The tram line was decommissioned in 2041; the pale brick of the old roadbed remains. Pao Street: a row of yellowed brick houses; the third from the canal end has a green-painted door and a small black iron balcony.

sensory_anchors.sight: the pale brick of the old tram roadbed; the gull on the warehouse eaves; pale teal of the door
sensory_anchors.sound: gulls; the tram bell that is not a tram bell anymore
sensory_anchors.smell: the canal's flat green smell; bread from a pao shop; cement of the fish market
sensory_anchors.touch: the cobble's slight unevenness; the cold brass of the bell-plate
sensory_anchors.taste: the salt the gulls carry inland

locations.name: Judge Tao's office on retirement morning
locations.description: Third floor of the College's east wing. Long oak table at the window, a small bone-handled letter knife being packed into a flat box. The room mostly empty.

sensory_anchors.sight: the bone-handled letter knife; Tao's silver hair down to her collarbone; the box on the table
sensory_anchors.sound: rain making uneven runs across the window; the door's well-oiled click
sensory_anchors.smell: old paper; the dust of an emptied office
sensory_anchors.touch: the table edge as a wall

locations.name: Court of Mneme, antechamber + corridor
locations.description: Small antechamber off the central hall, two chairs, one window facing the College garden. Connected by the corridor for the Court (not the public).

sensory_anchors.sight: the late-afternoon light on the garden; the senior judge framed in the doorway
sensory_anchors.sound: the door's click; the corridor's silence
sensory_anchors.smell: the trace of speculum extract carried out of the central hall
sensory_anchors.touch: the chair's wooden arm under her palm
